artifact.parent_prd_note: PRD-074 v0 describes broader Phase 1.2B; this FIB-S follows the stricter FIB-H split into Phase 1.2B-A and successor Phase 1.2B-B.

phase_boundary.one_line_invariant: If a change removes /100, promotes a deferred DTO type, or performs named pass-through contract/test updates required to keep this slice truthful - and nothing else - it is in scope.
phase_boundary.scope_containment_note: This FIB governs Phase 1.2B-A only. UI migration, full OpenAPI expansion, route matrix coverage, runtime observability, and component tests require successor FIB/PRD authority.
secondary_layers_allowed: API contract artifact: pass-through documentation updates only for named existing OpenAPI path entries
Enforcement artifact: focused assertion updates only in named existing Phase 1.2A route test files
Governance artifact: ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json status updates only

Mechanical compatibility artifact: direct or metric-type-aware property access updates in components that consume a promoted field (e.g. financial metrics read x.value.toFixed(); hold_percent keeps x.toFixed()), with no new business logic, formatting rules, styling, layout, or rendering semantics. Branching is allowed only to choose between FinancialValue.value and bare-number access for the existing metricType discriminant. Must not expand beyond components directly consuming the affected fields.
secondary_layer_constraints: Secondary layer updates must be strictly shape-alignment to existing fields
No new fields, scenarios, coverage patterns, paths, schemas, components, route logic, UI work, or runtime logging may be introduced
OpenAPI updates must not modify paths, schemas, or components outside the explicitly named path entries, even if nearby inconsistencies are observed
Any shift-intelligence authority discrepancy must be resolved in service mappers and DTO schemas only
phase_boundary.conditional_surface_note: GET /api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts may receive service DTO changes through ShiftAlertDTO, but Phase 1.2B-A may not birth a new OpenAPI path entry or route test for it unless a Phase 1.2A-authored path/test already exists and this FIB is amended.
stop_conditions: OpenAPI/schema/component changes outside named entries required
prohibited: full recent-sessions or live-view 4-case route test matrices
runtime structured log events for deprecated-field usage
BRIDGE-001 consumer audit as implementation work

intent.operator_problem: Phase 1.2A proved route transport honesty but deliberately left service-layer semantic gaps: BRIDGE-001 still converts database integer cents into dollar-float FinancialValue.value on recent-sessions and live-view surfaces, and shift-intelligence alert DTOs still expose financial metric values as bare number|null even though resolveShiftMetricAuthority already exists.
intent.pilot_fit: Phase 1.2B-A is the minimum service-layer canonicalization slice needed before surface alignment. It removes the BRIDGE-001 unit lie, enforces integer-cents DTO validation after the unit change, and promotes shift-intelligence financial metric fields using the existing authority router without coupling to UI, route expansion, or observability.
success_outcomes: OUT-1: BRIDGE-001 /100 conversion is removed from both known service mapper sites and FinancialValue.value emits integer cents for RecentSessionDTO and VisitLiveViewDTO financial fields
OUT-2: financialValueSchema.int() is enforced at the relevant DTO outbound boundaries after /100 removal, rejects fractional numeric values, and exact-value tests prove cents-unit semantics
OUT-3: AnomalyAlertDTO and ShiftAlertDTO financial metric fields emit FinancialValue|null using resolveShiftMetricAuthority return values
OUT-4: hold_percent remains bare number|null at every layer and is explicitly verified as DEF-NEVER
OUT-5: Named existing OpenAPI path entries and BRIDGE-001 route tests are shape-aligned to the canonical service contract without expanding route inventory or coverage pattern
OUT-6: ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json records DEF-001, DEF-002, DEF-003, DEF-007 closure and BRIDGE-001 retirement after implementation commit SHA is known
OUT-7: Phase 1.2B-B can proceed against canonical integer-cents service DTOs without rewriting this slice
explicit_exclusions: UI render migration from formatDollars to formatCents - Phase 1.2B-B
Full OpenAPI expansion beyond the named existing path entries - Phase 1.2B-B
Full route contract test matrices and remaining route-boundary tests - Phase 1.2B-B / Phase 1.4
Runtime deprecation observability and structured log events - Phase 1.2B-B
BRIDGE-001 consumer audit as an active delivery obligation - Phase 1.2B-B
Component test births for rating-slip-modal, start-from-previous, and start-from-previous-modal - Phase 1.3
Broad forbidden-label cleanup and formatter consolidation - Phase 1.3
ESLint no-unlabeled-financial-value and no-forbidden-financial-label rules - Phase 1.4
I5 truth-telling harness subset and CI mechanical enforcement - Phase 1.4
finance_outbox DDL, producers, workers, projection refactors, or pit_cash_observation.amount migration - Wave 2
Any hold_percent FinancialValue wrapping in any phase - DEF-NEVER

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Integer cents make render migration necessary next
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: UI migration introduces component surface coupling, Q-4 discovery risk, and visual regression surface. Phase 1.2B-A canonicalizes the service layer; Phase 1.2B-B aligns surfaces.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Expand all remaining OpenAPI routes in Phase 1.2B-A
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Contract expansion becomes easier once DTO meaning stabilizes
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Full expansion is a surface-alignment and inventory task, not required to canonicalize service semantics. Named path entries are enough to keep existing public contract artifacts truthful.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Wire runtime deprecation observability in Phase 1.2B-A
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Deprecation usage should eventually be measurable
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Runtime logs are route-layer surface work. This slice must not touch route handlers for observability.

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Broader route coverage would catch more transport regressions
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Full matrices are validation-layer work after stable semantics and surface alignment. Phase 1.2B-A needs only integer-value regression guards in named existing files.

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Validator enforcement is one of the desired outcomes
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Ordering is mandatory because z.number().int() rejects fractional numeric values but does not prove currency units. /100 removal must precede runtime integer enforcement, and exact-value tests must prove cents-unit semantics.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Wrap hold_percent in FinancialValue with an is_ratio flag
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: hold_percent appears alongside financial alert metrics
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: hold_percent is a dimensionless ratio, not currency. resolveShiftMetricAuthority returns null for it and DEF-NEVER forbids wrapping.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Patch shift-intelligence mapping discrepancies at route or UI level
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: A downstream compensation can appear faster if mapper promotion reveals a mismatch
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: The mapper and DTO schema are the only authority for this slice. Route-level or UI-level compensation violates the service canonicalization boundary.

entities.name: FinancialValue
entities.description: Currency envelope emitted at service and API boundaries. Phase 1.2B-A makes BRIDGE-001 surfaces carry integer cents in value and enforces integer validation at DTO outbound.

entities.name: RecentSessionDTO
entities.description: Visit continuation response item whose financial fields currently carry BRIDGE-001 dollar-float values and must become integer-cents FinancialValue fields.

entities.name: VisitLiveViewDTO
entities.description: Aggregated live-view DTO whose session financial totals currently divide cents by 100 in the rating-slip mapper and must emit integer-cents FinancialValue fields.

entities.name: AnomalyAlertDTO
entities.description: Shift-intelligence anomaly alert DTO whose financial metric fields must be promoted from bare number|null to FinancialValue|null using resolveShiftMetricAuthority.

entities.name: ShiftAlertDTO
entities.description: Shift-intelligence shift alert DTO whose financial metric fields must be promoted from bare number|null to FinancialValue|null using resolveShiftMetricAuthority.

entities.name: MetricType.hold_percent
entities.description: Dimensionless ratio metric that must remain number|null and must never be wrapped in FinancialValue.

entities.name: OpenAPI named path entries
entities.description: Existing representative path entries that may be shape-aligned to the canonical service DTO contract and no further.

entities.name: ROLLOUT-TRACKER
entities.description: Governance status artifact for retiring BRIDGE-001 and closing deferred DEF records after the implementation commit is known.

relationships: RecentSessionDTO financial fields are assembled in services/visit/crud.ts and must stop dividing database integer cents by 100.
VisitLiveViewDTO financial fields are mapped in services/rating-slip/mappers.ts and must stop dividing database integer cents by 100.
AnomalyAlertDTO and ShiftAlertDTO use resolveShiftMetricAuthority as the only approved source/type router for financial metric wrapping.
hold_percent is a non-currency ratio and remains outside FinancialValue even when adjacent shift-intelligence fields are promoted.
Named OpenAPI and route test artifacts follow the service DTO shape; they do not create new behavior.

capabilities.name: bridge-001-retirement
capabilities.description: Remove /100 from services/visit/crud.ts centsToDollars and services/rating-slip/mappers.ts toVisitLiveViewDTO so FinancialValue.value carries integer cents.

capabilities.name: integer-cents-outbound-validation
capabilities.description: Enable financialValueSchema.int() at the relevant DTO outbound boundaries after /100 removal so fractional numeric values fail validation, with exact-value tests proving cents-unit semantics.

capabilities.name: shift-intelligence-financialvalue-promotion
capabilities.description: Assign resolveShiftMetricAuthority return values into FinancialValue construction for AnomalyAlertDTO and ShiftAlertDTO financial metric fields.

capabilities.name: shift-intelligence-outbound-schema-birth
capabilities.description: Introduce outbound Zod schemas for AnomalyAlertDTO and ShiftAlertDTO, lifting the DEF-007 waiver while preserving hold_percent as number|null.

capabilities.name: named-contract-shape-alignment
capabilities.description: Update only named existing OpenAPI path entries to reflect integer BRIDGE-001 values and promoted anomaly-alert FinancialValue fields.

capabilities.name: integer-regression-test-assertions
capabilities.description: Replace key-presence-only assertions with integer-value assertions in the two named existing BRIDGE-001 route test files.

capabilities.name: rollout-tracker-closure
capabilities.description: Update ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json only for the listed DEF closures and BRIDGE-001 retirement after implementation commit SHA is available.

outbound.name: RecentSessionDTO FinancialValue envelope with integer-cents value
VisitLiveViewDTO FinancialValue envelope with integer-cents value
AnomalyAlertDTO FinancialValue envelope for financial metric fields
ShiftAlertDTO FinancialValue envelope for financial metric fields
OpenAPI named path entries aligned to canonical DTO shapes

permissions: remove /100 from named service mapper sites
enable DTO outbound integer validation after unit canonicalization
promote shift-intelligence DTO financial fields using resolveShiftMetricAuthority
introduce outbound Zod schemas for AnomalyAlertDTO and ShiftAlertDTO
restrictions: may not migrate UI render calls
may not move financial construction into route handlers
may not invent new financial authorities or source classifications

permissions: shape-align named existing OpenAPI path entries
update integer assertions in named existing route test files
restrictions: may not add new OpenAPI path entries
may not modify schemas or components outside named entries
may not add route logic or observability
may not create new route test files or new scenarios
may not expand into full route test matrices

permissions: update rollout tracker status for listed closure records
restrictions: scope changes require FIB amendment before EXEC-SPEC update

trigger_events.name: phase-1-2a-exit-gate-passed
preconditions: Phase 1.2A pass-through route tests and representative OpenAPI entries exist
BRIDGE-001 documented as active dollar-float state

trigger_events.name: exec-074-scaffolded
preconditions: FIB-H and FIB-S for Phase 1.2B-A exist
PRD-074 exists or is amended to the stricter Phase 1.2B-A boundary

trigger_events.name: mapper-emits-financialvalue
preconditions: service mapper receives database integer cents
/100 bridge has been removed before validation

trigger_events.name: contract-test-run
preconditions: named existing route test files are present
integer-value assertions have replaced key-presence-only assertions

trigger_events.name: rollout-tracker-closure
preconditions: DEF closure and BRIDGE-001 retirement evidence has passed validation

lifecycle_events: financialValueSchema present but not outbound-enforced -> DTO outbound integer enforcement active
AnomalyAlertDTO/ShiftAlertDTO financial metric fields bare number|null -> FinancialValue|null
hold_percent carve-out implicit -> hold_percent DEF-NEVER verified
Phase 1.2B-A service canonicalization -> Phase 1.2B-B surface alignment
timing_constraints: Phase 1.2B-A may not begin before Phase 1.2A exit gate passes
/100 removal must precede financialValueSchema.int() outbound enforcement
Phase 1.2B-B may not begin before Phase 1.2B-A exit gate passes
Phase 1.3 component work may not begin before Phase 1.2B-B exit gate passes

business_rules.statement: BRIDGE-001 retirement removes /100 from the two named mapper sites and nowhere else unless this FIB is amended.
financialValueSchema.int() outbound enforcement is allowed only after /100 removal.
Shift-intelligence financial metric fields are wrapped only in service mappers using resolveShiftMetricAuthority return values.
hold_percent remains bare number|null at every layer and must never become FinancialValue.
Route handlers are transport only and may not construct, re-author, or compensate for FinancialValue semantics.
OpenAPI edits are limited to named existing path entries and shape-alignment of existing fields.
Route test edits are limited to integer-value regression assertions in the two named existing BRIDGE-001 route test files.
UI migration, full OpenAPI expansion, route test matrices, and runtime observability belong to Phase 1.2B-B.
Component test birth belongs to Phase 1.3, not Phase 1.2B-A.

invariants: FinancialValue.value is integer cents at the service boundary for RecentSessionDTO and VisitLiveViewDTO after this slice.
No /100 conversion remains in the named BRIDGE-001 mapper sites after STEP-1.
hold_percent remains number|null and is never wrapped.
resolveShiftMetricAuthority remains the only approved shift-intelligence metric authority router.
Route handlers do not assign type, source, completeness, or FinancialValue wrappers.
Secondary artifact updates do not introduce new fields, paths, schemas, components, scenarios, or coverage patterns.
decision_notes: Phase 1.2A established transport honesty and documented the current non-canonical state; Phase 1.2B-A changes service semantics.
The Phase 1.2B-A / 1.2B-B split avoids the PRD-070 failure pattern of bundling root-cause canonicalization with downstream surface alignment.
OpenAPI and route-test edits are allowed only to keep already-covered public contracts truthful after service canonicalization.
The tracker pending_scope component-test listing is treated as stale because PRD-071 Appendix D and DEF-006 classify component test birth as Phase 1.3.

loop.action: Remove /100 from services/visit/crud.ts centsToDollars and services/rating-slip/mappers.ts toVisitLiveViewDTO.
loop.system_response: RecentSessionDTO and VisitLiveViewDTO financial fields carry integer-cents FinancialValue.value from service mappers.

loop.action: Enable financialValueSchema.int() at the DTO outbound boundary for RecentSessionDTO and VisitLiveViewDTO after STEP-1.
loop.system_response: Fractional numeric values fail DTO outbound validation, and exact-value tests catch cents-unit regressions.

loop.action: Promote resolveShiftMetricAuthority void-reads into FinancialValue construction for AnomalyAlertDTO and ShiftAlertDTO financial metric fields; add outbound schemas; preserve hold_percent as number|null.
loop.system_response: Shift-intelligence service DTOs expose FinancialValue|null for financial metric fields and retain the hold_percent carve-out.

loop.action: Shape-align only named existing OpenAPI path entries and replace key-presence assertions with integer-value assertions in named BRIDGE-001 route test files.
loop.system_response: Existing public contract artifacts and tests match canonical service semantics without expanding route inventory or scenarios.

loop.action: Update ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json for DEF-001, DEF-002, DEF-003, DEF-007 closure and BRIDGE-001 retirement with implementation commit SHA.
loop.system_response: Governance state records Phase 1.2B-A closure and enables Phase 1.2B-B planning.

required_existing: Phase 1.2A exit gate passed on 2026-04-30 (EXEC-071, commit 46229a98)
lib/financial/schema.ts - financialValueSchema with integer value constraint
Named Phase 1.2A BRIDGE-001 route test files
missing_dependencies: EXEC-074 not yet scaffolded at FIB-S generation time
Implementation commit SHA unknown until EXEC-074 completion; ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json must be updated with the real SHA during execution
assumptions: Database and RPC sources already return integer cents before the BRIDGE-001 /100 conversion.
No route handler performs financial math; Phase 1.2A grep confirmed route pass-through.
The named OpenAPI path entries are sufficient to keep already-covered public contracts truthful for Phase 1.2B-A.
Any additional route, UI, observability, or test-matrix need means this FIB must be amended or split before implementation continues.

outcomes.statement: BRIDGE-001 /100 conversion is removed from both known service mapper sites and FinancialValue.value emits integer cents for RecentSessionDTO and VisitLiveViewDTO financial fields.
financialValueSchema.int() is enforced at the relevant DTO outbound boundaries after /100 removal, rejects fractional numeric values, and exact-value tests prove cents-unit semantics.
AnomalyAlertDTO and ShiftAlertDTO financial metric fields emit FinancialValue|null using resolveShiftMetricAuthority return values.
hold_percent remains bare number|null at every layer and is explicitly verified as DEF-NEVER.
Named existing OpenAPI path entries and BRIDGE-001 route tests are shape-aligned to the canonical service contract without expanding route inventory or coverage pattern.
ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json records DEF-001, DEF-002, DEF-003, DEF-007 closure and BRIDGE-001 retirement after implementation commit SHA is known.
Phase 1.2B-B can proceed against canonical integer-cents service DTOs without rewriting this slice.

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.question: Does EXEC-074 need to pin exact AnomalyAlertDTO nullability for each promoted field where resolveShiftMetricAuthority returns null?
open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.boundary: Resolution may refine DTO/schema implementation but may not wrap hold_percent or move compensation to route/UI layers.

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.question: Does EXEC-074 need to pin exact ShiftAlertDTO non-nullability/nullability for observedValue, baselineMedian, and baselineMad?
open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.boundary: Resolution may refine DTO/schema implementation but may not add new fields or new route surfaces.

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.question: Do the named existing OpenAPI path entries already cover the exact fields requiring shape-alignment?
open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold.boundary: If not, implementation stops for amendment; Phase 1.2B-A may not create new path entries.

governance.successor_fib_required: Phase 1.2B-B - Surface Alignment (UI migration + full OpenAPI expansion + route matrices + runtime observability)
